title: Fires Rage in Tehran After Fuel Depot Strikes | 10 News
description: Huge flames erupted into the sky over Tehran after Israel reported striking several fuel storage facilities in the Iranian capital.  Videos showed massive columns of fire rising from the targeted areas, including the Aqdasieh fuel depot in northern Tehran on Sunday.  The Israeli military said on Telegram that it had struck a number of fuel storage facilities in the city, claiming they were used by Iran’s armed forces to supply fuel for military infrastructure. title: Trump Rejects Negotiations, Vows to Eliminate Iran’s Military & Leadership | 10 News
description: US President Donald Trump has denied any involvement in the bombing of a girls’ school in southern Iran on the first day of the war, which reportedly killed 175 people.  Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One, Trump said, “We think it was done by Iran, because they’re very inaccurate, as you know, with their munitions. They have no accuracy whatsoever. It was done by Iran.”  He also stated that he is not interested in negotiating with Iran at this stage, adding that the air campaign aims to eliminate any potential leadership and destroy the country’s military. title: Hometown Hero Oscar Piastri Crashes Out Of AUSGP In Warm Up | 10 News

title: Flood Threat Looms Over Queensland As Katherine Faces Worst Flooding In 30 Years | 10 News

But Queensland isn’t the only region facing heavy rainfall. The outback town of Katherine has experienced its worst flooding in nearly 30 years.
